Original Requirements:
Gamified Competency Assessment Platform

An educational platform where instructors design competency-based practice exams delivered to students in a gamified environment. Students earn nuggets by demonstrating mastery, while instructors gain rich analytics to evaluate individual and cohort competencies.

Core features:
- Let instructors register, log in, and manage a personal dashboard showing active exams, enrollment counts, and competency coverage
- Let instructors build exams with mixed question types (MCQ, drag-and-drop, code snippet) and tag - each question with one or more competencies
- Assign a difficulty tier (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) to each question that determines its nugget reward multiplier
- Let instructors schedule exams with an open date, a close date, and an optional per-attempt time limit enforced server-side
- Let instructors create cohorts, enroll students individually, and restrict each exam to one or more cohorts
- Show instructors a per-competency heatmap after each exam, highlighting competencies below a configurable mastery threshold in red
- Let instructors grant manual bonus nuggets to individual students with a written justification logged as an audit event
- Let students register and personalize a profile with an avatar, and display their nugget balance, earned badges, and competency radar chart
- Deliver exams to students one question at a time in a game-like interface with a live timer, progress bar, and animated nugget counter
- Build a streak system where consecutive correct answers apply a nugget multiplier (1.5×, 2×, 3×) that resets on any wrong answer
- Show students an instant competency breakdown after submission, flagging weak competencies with an study tip for each
- Maintain a nugget wallet per student redeemable in a reward store for virtual items or instructor-configured institutional perks
- Rank students on a cohort leaderboard by nuggets earned over a configurable window, with opt-out and instructor disable options
- Let students review every past attempt with their answers, correct answers, nuggets earned per question, and competency trend charts over time
- Enforce role-based access control across Admin, Instructor, and Student roles and write every sensitive action to an immutable audit log
Product Goals: Create an engaging and motivating learning experience through gamification
Provide instructors with actionable, data-driven insights into student competency
Ensure a secure, scalable, and role-based platform with full auditability
User Stories: As an instructor, I want to create exams with mixed question types and tag them with competencies so I can assess specific skills.
As a student, I want to take exams in a game-like interface with a live timer and streak multiplier so I stay engaged and motivated.
As an instructor, I want to view a per-competency heatmap after an exam so I can identify which topics my class is struggling with.
As a student, I want to review my past attempts and see my competency trends over time so I can track my progress.
As an administrator, I want a complete audit log of all sensitive actions so I can ensure platform integrity and compliance.
Competitive Analysis: Kahoot!: Strong gamification and live engagement, but lacks deep competency tracking and custom question types like code snippets.
Quizlet: Good for flashcard-style learning and basic quizzes, but no role-based access or detailed analytics for instructors.
ProProfs Quiz Maker: Supports various question types and scheduling, but gamification elements are limited and UI is dated.
EdApp: Mobile-first with gamification and analytics, but competency mapping and custom code questions are not core features.
Moodle Quiz: Highly customizable with competency frameworks, but user experience is not game-like and setup is complex.
ClassMarker: Secure exam platform with scheduling and analytics, but lacks a streak system, nugget economy, and student profiles.
Duolingo for Schools: Excellent gamification and streak mechanics, but limited to language learning and not for custom competency exams.

Requirement Analysis: The platform requires a dual-interface system: one for instructors (exam creation, cohort management, analytics) and one for students (gamified exam taking, progress tracking, rewards). The core differentiator is the integration of competency-based assessment with gamification mechanics (nuggets, streaks, leaderboards). Key technical challenges include: (1) enforcing server-side time limits per attempt, (2) implementing a streak multiplier that resets on wrong answers, (3) generating per-competency heatmaps and radar charts, (4) maintaining an immutable audit log for all sensitive actions, and (5) supporting mixed question types (MCQ, drag-and-drop, code snippet) with difficulty tiers. Role-based access control (Admin, Instructor, Student) is critical for security. The nugget wallet and reward store add an economic layer that must be carefully balanced to avoid exploitation.
Requirement Pool: Implement role-based authentication and authorization (Admin, Instructor, Student) with a secure login and registration system.
Build the instructor exam builder supporting MCQ, drag-and-drop, and code snippet questions, each tagged with competencies and a difficulty tier.
Develop the gamified student exam interface with one-question-at-a-time delivery, live timer, progress bar, animated nugget counter, and streak multiplier system.
Create the instructor analytics dashboard including per-competency heatmaps, configurable mastery thresholds, and cohort-level performance views.
Implement the student profile and progress review system with nugget balance, badges, competency radar chart, past attempt review, and trend charts.
UI Design draft: The UI will have two main themes: a professional, data-rich interface for instructors and a vibrant, game-like interface for students. The instructor dashboard will feature a top navigation bar (Dashboard, Exams, Cohorts, Analytics, Store), a sidebar for quick stats (active exams, enrollments), and a main content area with cards and tables. The student interface will use a full-screen, immersive layout with a central question card, a top bar showing timer, streak indicator, and nugget counter, and a bottom progress bar. Animations will be used for nugget collection and streak activation. Color coding (green for correct, red for incorrect) will provide instant feedback. The reward store will be a simple grid of items with nugget prices.
Anything UNCLEAR: The exact mechanism for 'instructor-configured institutional perks' in the reward store needs clarification. Are these physical items, digital vouchers, or custom badges? Also, the 'configurable window' for the leaderboard needs a default value (e.g., last 30 days) and a maximum range. The audit log retention policy (e.g., indefinite or time-based) is not specified.
